assertions.text: Invokes upgrade-vendor.sh design.md to fetch and ff-only pull the vendored design.md stack
Relays the script's one-line summary and maps exit codes (0 up-to-date/pulled, 3 unsafe)
Runs the vendor upgrade check (git fetch + count commits behind upstream google-labs-code/design.md)
Stops without forcing the pull when the tree is dirty or on a non-default branch, summarizing the reason
